overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto III showing a character walking through an urban city street at night. The weather transitions from clear to heavy rain as the character navigates sidewalks, waits at a crosswalk, and crosses through traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a building with red graffiti tags

notable_agents.action: ambulance with flashing lights driving down the street

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in red graffiti tags running along the sidewalk
large yellow building signage with red text visible across the street
tall street light pole with yellow sodium vapor lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an urban sidewalk at night, passing by a graffiti-covered wall on the right. Street lamps cast a warm yellow glow over the scene. An ambulance drives past on the left side of the street, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

events.description: ambulance with flashing lights passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the intersection, approaching other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit standing on the sidewalk near the corner

entered.detail: yellow traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk corner
white painted pedestrian crossing lines visible on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an urban intersection, passing a blue mailbox and traffic light pole. The graffiti wall falls behind as the sidewalk opens up to the street corner. An ambulance drives past with lights flashing, and more pedestrians become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with pedestrian crosswalk in heavy rain

events.description: weather suddenly changes to heavy rain with visible rain streaks and wet surfaces
character stops walking and waits at the crosswalk for the traffic signal

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk corner waiting for the pedestrian signal to change while rain begins to fall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket and gray pants crossing the street in front of the character

entered.detail: yellow pedestrian crossing signal box showing white walk symbol
heavy rain falling throughout the scene with visible streaks and wet ground reflections

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain suddenly begins falling as the character reaches the intersection corner. The character stops to wait at the crosswalk while pedestrians cross in front. The pedestrian signal shows a white walk symbol, and rain creates reflective wet surfaces on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing multi-lane street in heavy rain

events.description: character begins crossing the street through traffic
character navigates between stopped vehicles including a green delivery truck and cars

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane street through traffic, weaving between vehicles in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: green delivery truck stopped at the intersection waiting for traffic

entered.detail: yellow commercial building with large signage visible across the street
large green box truck with headlights on stopped in the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street in heavy rain, moving between stopped vehicles including a green delivery truck. The blue mailbox and traffic light fall behind as the character enters the crosswalk. Rain continues to fall heavily, creating a wet reflective surface on the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a city sidewalk at night that transforms from a clear evening into a heavy rainstorm. It begins with the character walking past a graffiti-covered wall under the warm yellow glow of street lamps as an ambulance drives by. As the character approaches an urban intersection, the graffiti wall recedes and the sidewalk opens up past a blue mailbox and traffic light pole. The scene then shifts abruptly as heavy rain begins to fall, turning the ground into a reflective wet surface while the character pauses at the crosswalk. Finally, the camera moves forward into the street, navigating between stopped vehicles and a green delivery truck under the persistent downpour.
